  first: f32,
  second: f32,
};

@group(0) @binding(0) var<read> left_values: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<read> right_values: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var<read_write> output_values: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var<uniform> params: Params;

@group(0) @binding(0) var<storage, read> left_values_storage: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read> right_values_storage: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var<storage, read_write> output_values_storage: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var<uniform> params: Params;

@compute @workgroup_size(64)
fn main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) global_id: vec3<u32>) {
  let index = global_id.x;
  if (index >= params.length) {
    return;
  }
  let left = left_values_storage[index];
  let right = right_values_storage[index];
  let result = left + right;
  let output_index = params.output_offset + index;
  output_values_storage[output_index] = result;
}

  length: u32,
  output_offset: u32,
  scale: f32,
  bias: f32,
};

@group(0) @binding(0) var<storage, read> input_values: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> output_values: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var<uniform> params: Params;

@compute @workgroup_size(64)

  let index = global_id.x;
  if (index >= params.length) {

  let value = input_values[index] * params.scale + params.bias;
  output_values[params.output_offset + index] = value;
}

  output_offset: u32,
  lower: f32,
  upper: f32,
};

@group(0) @binding(0) var<storage, read> input_values: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> output_values: array<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var<uniform> params: Params;

@compute @workgroup_size(64)
fn main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) global_id: vec3<u32>) {
  let index = global_id.x;
  if (index >= params.length) {
    return;
  }
  let value = input_values[index];
  let clamped = clamp(value, params.lower, params.upper);
  output_values[params.output_offset + index] = clamped;
}
